% cv-certifications.tex (tagged) — \cvcert{code}{title} rows.
% Generated by stklug84/actions cv/parse — do not edit by hand.
% Each cert renders as a monochrome code chip (e.g. AZ-305) followed by the
% muted title. \cvcertlist (a code-chip-aligned list) and \cvcert are
% provided by the tagged style; the chip left edges line up with the
% section heading rather than overflowing into the left margin.
\cvcertlist{%
  \cvcert{AZ-305}{Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert}
}
